text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. One key application is text understanding, where computers analyze written content to grasp its meaning. NLP also powers translation tools, allowing people to convert text between languages with increasing accuracy. Another important use is sentiment analysis, which detects emotions in text, such as positive or negative opinions in product reviews. Finally, NLP enables chatbots to have natural conversations with users, answering questions or providing customer service. From translating messages to understanding feelings, NLP is changing how we interact with technology.
